subject: Apache 2 license addition for consul,appc
commit_message:

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

If you are modifying an existing license then you need to do it as follows:

Modifications Copyright (C) 2018 <Company Name(s)>

Additional information can be found on the following URL:
https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/Rules+for+implementing+FOSS+in+a+project?focusedCommentId=38110843#comment-38110843

After running "make all", I run this command: 
helm upgrade -i aaa local/onap --namespace onap --set global.pullPolicy=IfNotPresent -f ~/global-values.yaml --set pomba.enabled=false

Release "aaa" does not exist. Installing it now.
